title: Nobokikizator
description: A mod that replaces all player skins with nobokik skin
body:
## Nobokikizator
Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of complete control with the **Nobokikizator** mod! Everyone around will become copies of the great Nobokik, the **best** tech-admin of RuMine. From now on, you will be surrounded not by motley skins, but by an army of his clones. Forward to the Nobokikization of the Minecraft world!

![Nobokikizator demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/umM1Z79T/images/c1b2faa414763f9ac99236a47b30ccce50d3eaa7.png)
